segments.original_text: あ、チビシンじゃないか?

segments.text: Up smash connects and launches them!
segments.original_text: 上スマッシュが当たって浮かせていった展開
オートキャンセルお見事

segments.text: They somehow made it back to stage...
segments.original_text: なんとか地面は踏んだが

segments.text: But the off-ledge battle isn't over!
segments.original_text: それでも終わらないこの崖の外

full_text: Oh, it's Chibi Shen! Up smash connects and launches them! Beautiful auto-cancel! They somehow made it back to stage... But the off-ledge battle isn't over! One final jump!
